changeSet.author: cherevko
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE n SET n.degree = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.Edges e WHERE e.source_node_id = n.node_id OR e.target_node_id = n.node_id ) FROM dbo.Nodes n;
INSERT INTO dbo.tables (db_, name, type, author, version, service, description, column_count, created_at) VALUES ('liquibase_lab', 'nodes table', 'ALTER_TABLE', 'cherevko', 2, 'graph_service', 'Added degree field to store node connection count.', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('nodes table')), SYSUTCDATETIME());
